expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names `merge_get_part` as the operation to find the source part table
expectations.evidence: Section 3 explicitly uses `PositionOutput.merge_get_part(merge_key)` and warns about the classmethod-restriction-discard footgun.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names `fetch1_dataframe()` on the restricted merge master as the way to materialize position data — does NOT suggest fetching a 'position' column directly off PositionOutput
expectations.evidence: Lead recommendation `(PositionOutput & merge_key).fetch1_dataframe()`; never proposes a direct .fetch1('position') on the merge.
